name: SlDrawer
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/drawer/drawer.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: open
props.description:
Indicates whether or not the drawer is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the drawer, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the drawer's open state.

props.name: label
props.description:
The drawer's label as displayed in the header. You should always include a relevant label even when using
`no-header`, as it is required for proper accessibility. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

props.name: placement
props.description: The direction from which the drawer will open.

props.name: contained
props.description:
By default, the drawer slides out of its containing block (usually the viewport). To make the drawer slide out of
its parent element, set this attribute and add `position: relative` to the parent.

props.name: no-header
props.description:
Removes the header. This will also remove the default close button, so please ensure you provide an easy,
accessible way for users to dismiss the drawer.

props.name: noHeader
props.description:
Removes the header. This will also remove the default close button, so please ensure you provide an easy,
accessible way for users to dismiss the drawer.

events.name: show
events.description: Emitted when the drawer opens. (CEM event "sl-show")

events.name: afterShow
events.description: Emitted after the drawer opens and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-show")

events.name: hide
events.description: Emitted when the drawer closes. (CEM event "sl-hide")

events.name: afterHide
events.description: Emitted after the drawer closes and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-hide")

events.name: initialFocus
events.description: Emitted when the drawer opens and is ready to receive focus. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will prevent focusing and allow you to set it on a different element, such as an input. (CEM event "sl-initial-focus")

events.name: requestClose
events.description: Emitted when the user attempts to close the drawer by clicking the close button, clicking the overlay, or pressing escape. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will keep the drawer open. Avoid using this unless closing the drawer will result in destructive behavior such as data loss. (CEM event "sl-request-close")
